title: cerasus × media
intro: Cerasus × media, also known as the apricot plum, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Prunus armeniaca (apricot) and Prunus mume (Chinese plum). The cerasus × media plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming cerasus × media include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Cerasus × media can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its fruits are also eaten fresh or used in jams and preserves.
